mission_title: Repair Bay V2 — Guarded Repair Handoff

argv: from pathlib import Path;files=[Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py'),Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\repair_bay_handoff.py'),Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\VERIFY_REPAIR_BAY_V1.py')];[compile(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'),str(p),'exec') for p in files];print('REPAIR_BAY_V2_SOURCE_COMPILE_OK')

argv: import json,sys;from pathlib import Path;root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI');sys.path.insert(0,str(root));from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_repair_bay_scan;from core.repair_bay_handoff import build_repair_handoff;r=run_repair_bay_scan(root,mode='full',context={'validation':'repair_bay_v2_live_handoff_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;review=[f for f in r.get('findings',[]) if f.get('severity') in {'urgent','recommended'}];assert review, 'Live scan produced no review finding for handoff smoke test';f=review[0];h=build_repair_handoff(root,r,f.get('id'),level='advanced');assert h.get('ok') is True,h;assert h.get('read_only') is True,h;assert int(h.get('changes_applied') or 0)==0,h;assert h.get('mission_staged') is False,h;assert h.get('implementation_authorized') is False,h;assert ':: APPLY' not in str(h.get('engineer_command') or ''),h;assert 'workshop apply' not in str(h.get('engineer_command') or '').lower(),h;limits=h.get('safety_limits') or {};assert limits.get('automatic_apply_allowed') is False,limits;assert limits.get('network_allowed') is False,limits;print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V2_LIVE_OK':True,'finding_id':(h.get('finding') or {}).get('id'),'eligible':h.get('eligible'),'status':h.get('status'),'affected_paths':len(h.get('affected_paths') or []),'mission_staged':h.get('mission_staged'),'implementation_authorized':h.get('implementation_authorized')},indent=2))
